parameters.content:
A9 + A10 + A11 — Intake & qualification des leads (le « wow »)

1. IMAP : lit la boîte commune (portails + site).
2. A9 : Claude Haiku classe (spam / documents / suivi / lead) et extrait les infos.
3. Switch : route selon la catégorie.
4. Lead → A9 crée le lead + A11 la fiche CRM (sans ressaisie) → A10 réponse instantanée 24/7 + horodatage.
5. Non-lead → journalisé (spam écarté, pièces classées, suivi identifié).

⚠️ Renseigner IMMOMAIL_AGENCY_ID (résolution agence) — ou dériver l'agence de l'adresse de réception.

parameters.query:
WITH ins_contact AS (
  INSERT INTO contacts (id, agency_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, role, buyer_criteria, consent_marketing, created_at)
  SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }},
         split_part({{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.name) }}, ' ', 1),
         NULLIF(regexp_replace({{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.name) }}, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), ''),
         {{ $json.email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.email) : 'NULL' }},
         {{ $json.phone ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.phone) : 'NULL' }},
         CASE {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.request_type) }} WHEN 'rental' THEN 'tenant' WHEN 'valuation' THEN 'owner' ELSE 'buyer' END,
         NULL, TRUE, now()::text
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c WHERE c.agency_id = {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }} AND c.email = {{ $json.email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.email) : 'NULL' }} AND {{ $json.email ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}
  )
  RETURNING id
),
contact_id AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM ins_contact),
    (SELECT id FROM contacts WHERE agency_id = {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }} AND email = {{ $json.email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.email) : 'NULL' }} LIMIT 1)
  ) AS id
),
prop AS (
  SELECT id, negotiator FROM properties
  WHERE agency_id = {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }} AND ref = {{ $json.property_ref ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.property_ref) : 'NULL' }}
  LIMIT 1
),
seq AS ( SELECT 'LD-' || (501 + count(*)) AS ext FROM leads WHERE agency_id = {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }} ),
ins_lead AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (id, agency_id, external_id, contact_id, property_id, name, email, phone, assigned_to, request_type, priority, status, created_at)
  SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, (SELECT ext FROM seq),
         (SELECT id FROM contact_id), (SELECT id FROM prop),
         {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.name) }}, {{ $json.email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.email) : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.phone ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.phone) : 'NULL' }},
         COALESCE((SELECT negotiator FROM prop), 'Accueil agence'),
         {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.request_type) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.priority) }}, 'new', now()::text
  RETURNING id, external_id, assigned_to, contact_id
),
log AS (
  INSERT INTO activity_log (id, agency_id, automation_type, description, ref_id, occurred_at, created_at)
  SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, 'A9',
         'Lead qualifié ' || external_id || ' : ' || {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.name) }} || ' → ' || assigned_to, id, now()::text, now()::text
  FROM ins_lead
),
log_crm AS (
  INSERT INTO activity_log (id, agency_id, automation_type, description, ref_id, occurred_at, created_at)
  SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, 'A11',
         'Fiche CRM créée sans ressaisie pour ' || {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.name) }}, contact_id, now()::text, now()::text
  FROM ins_lead
)
SELECT id AS lead_id, external_id, assigned_to FROM ins_lead;

nodes.name: A9 · Créer le lead + fiche CRM (A11)

parameters.subject: =Votre demande — {{ $('⚙️ Config agence').first().json.agency_name }}

main.node: A9 · Créer le lead + fiche CRM (A11)

meta.note: Boîte commune → Claude classe/extrait (A9) → lead + CRM (A11) → réponse instantanée (A10).
